issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as connection failures and channel errors.

scenarios.name: durable-queue-dlx-ttl
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements except closing the channel/connection, while Response A misses several key details such as contentType, messageId, timestamp, prefetch count, and uses reject instead of nack.

scenarios.name: topic-exchange-subscription
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes some correct elements but fails to meet key rubric items (exchange name, exclusive queue, binding pattern), whereas Response B provides no content.
